assessments.rationale: Solar parks are MV-connected under the same VDE-AR-N 4110 regime. BESS retrofit may need DSO capacity upgrade or transformer resizing; standard engineering practice.
assessments.mitigation: Early DSO capacity study at contract signing, Share existing PV grid-connection point (netzdienliche Kopplung), Size BESS to match Ausbaustufe of existing PV feeder

assessments.rationale: Utility PV parks occupy 1.5-2.5 ha/MWp. A 9 MWh BESS consumes <1% of an existing PV site; land already secured, fenced, permitted.
Rural solar-park sites routinely achieve property-line distances and fire-service access. >3 MWh clusters handled with standard VdS alignment.
assessments.mitigation: VdS 6023/3103 aligned separation plan, Container spacing >=3 m with deflagration venting, Dedicated Feuerwehr-Zufahrt and Einsatzplan

assessments.rationale: Baseline safety scope applicable to every BESS market; no PV-co-location escalation. Already part of Mein Solar 4.5 MW / 9 MWh reference design.
assessments.mitigation: Grade-A LFP cells only, NOVEC 1230 suppression and BMS temperature monitoring, Compartmentalized racks with deflagration panels

assessments.rationale: FGW TR3 + TR8 certification path is Mein Solar's core PV-EPC competence; directly reusable for PV+BESS hybrid plant. Lead time parallel to procurement, not additive.
assessments.mitigation: Kick off FGW grid-study at contract signing (parallel path), Use pre-certified L2 BESS container (CATL EnerC / Sungrow / SolarEast), Bundle BESS plant cert with co-located PV plant cert where possible

assessments.rationale: FX, tariff, CRMA exposure are global supply-side factors, not market-specific. PV+BESS developers already price this into CAPEX models.
German solar-park sites well inside -20 to +50 C envelope (historical -18 C to +38 C). HVAC maintains internal setpoint; efficiency penalty <2% at extremes.
10-15% AC-AC loss is thermodynamic floor across all BESS markets. PV+BESS business case already prices it into arbitrage, peak-shaving and StromNEV revenue stacks.
PV+BESS is the most CAPEX-mature BESS segment. 250-400 EUR/kWh routinely achieved by Tier-1 L2 suppliers. Economics proven; cost is never a knockout per step-08 rules.
